news.headline: Nasdaq soars above 20,000 post-inflation data; Alphabet jumps 5.5% after Gemini 2.0 reveal. Fear & Greed Index at 'Neutral'. Macy's falls by 1%.
news.summary: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index showed a positive shift in overall market sentiment on Wednesday, though it remained in the “Neutral” zone. U.S. stock market ended with mixed results as the Nasdaq Composite hit a record high. Macy’s Inc (NYSE:M) shares dropped around 1% following the release of third-quarter results. Meanwhile, Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) saw a 5.5% increase, potentially influenced by the unveiling of Gemini 2.0. Economic data indicated that the Consumer Price Index grew by 2.7% year-over-year in November 2024, surpassing the 2.6% reading from October. For the full article, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Menarini Group & MEDSIR collaborate on ADELA study to treat advanced ER+/HER2- breast cancer with ESR1 mutations.
news.summary: An international phase III trial called ADELA is underway in various countries, testing the combination of elacestrant and everolimus for the treatment of advanced ER+/HER2- breast cancer in patients with ESR1 mutations. The goal of the study is to prolong the time before disease progression occurs. This research was shared by the Menarini Group and MEDSIR at the San Francisco Medical Conference.

news.headline: Ciena to report Q4 earnings on Dec. 12. Analysts forecast 65 cents/share, down from 75 cents last year. Revenue expected at $1.1B. Price target raised to $82. Shares closed at $73.21, up 3.3%. Check Benzinga for full story.
news.summary: Ciena Corporation (NYSE:CIEN) is scheduled to announce its fourth-quarter financial results on Thursday, December 12, before the market opens. Analysts anticipate the company, based in Hanover, Maryland, to post earnings of 65 cents per share for the quarter, a decrease from 75 cents per share reported in the same period last year. Ciena forecasts quarterly revenue of $1.1 billion, slightly lower than the $1.13 billion recorded a year ago, according to data from Benzinga Pro. Stifel analyst Ruben Roy reaffirmed Ciena as a Buy on Tuesday, boosting the price target from $75 to $82. Following this news, Ciena's stock closed at $73.21 on Wednesday, marking a 3.3% increase. For more details, interested parties can find the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ifo: If the German economy fails to overcome structural challenges, only 0.4% growth vs. 1.1% if the right economic policy course is set.
ifo Institute forecasts growth between 0.4% and 1.1% for Germany in 2025.
Computershare (ASX: CPU) to acquire ingage IR Limited, a global investor relations software company with clients in 15 countries, included in FT1000 list.
news.summary: In an announcement, Computershare Limited (ASX: CPU) has disclosed its decision to acquire ingage IR Limited, a provider of investor relations and engagement software aiding listed companies in enhancing and overseeing their investor relations capabilities. With a clientele spanning across 15 countries worldwide, ingage was recognized in the FT1000 list of Europe’s rapidly expanding companies for the years 2023 and 2024. Fiona Chalmers, the global Head of Issuer Services at Computershare, expressed enthusiasm about the acquisition, highlighting the strategic value it will bring to their services.

news.headline: ifo Institute expects 2.3% inflation in 2025 and 2% in 2026 in both scenarios.
Wirex launches Visa Platinum card for UK customers, offering exclusive benefits on top of Visa benefits.
news.summary: In London on December 12, 2024, Wirex, a prominent Web3 financial application, announced the launch of the Visa Platinum card for its customers in the UK. This new card provides exclusive benefits from Wirex in addition to the existing Visa card benefits. Customers can access these benefits through both virtual and physical cards.

news.headline: Tech Mahindra integrates with ServiceNow to deliver GenAI-powered solutions, targeting enterprises globally. (Char: 109)
news.summary: In Pune, India and Seattle on December 12, 2024, a major tech firm, Tech Mahindra (NSE: TECHM), known for providing technology consulting and digital solutions to various industries globally, revealed its partnership with ServiceNow. This collaboration aims to propel enterprises into the GenAI era through One E2E strategy, marking a significant advancement in the tech industry.

news.headline: BPC Instruments gets 1.1 MSEK orders for BPC Air from KTH Sweden and University of Texas USA.
news.summary: In Lund, Sweden, on December 12, 2024, BPC Instruments AB (publ) shared positive news about receiving orders from prestigious institutions - KTH Sweden and University of Texas USA. The total revenue from these orders amounted to 1.1 million Swedish Krona. Among the products included in these orders were the recently introduced BPC® Air and Gas Endeavour® III, which is the flagship product of BPC. This development highlights the increasing interest in BPC's innovative instruments from renowned academic institutions.

news.headline: SNB's Chairman Schlegel: It's possible to have sub-zero in inflation in some months.
Trump personally invites Xi Jinping to attend inauguration on 12/12/2024, reported by CBS and Bloomberg.
news.summary: In a recent update on the global economy, it was reported that the GDP growth rate for the United States in the last quarter was 6.4%, surpassing expectations. This growth was driven largely by strong consumer spending and business investments. On the other hand, the Eurozone saw a decrease in their GDP by 0.6%, impacted by continued lockdown measures. In terms of employment, the US added 900,000 jobs in the same quarter, leading to a decrease in the unemployment rate to 5.8%. In contrast, the Eurozone experienced a rise in unemployment to 8.1%. These contrasting economic performances are reflective of the ongoing challenges faced by different regions amidst the global pandemic.

news.headline: Romania and Bulgaria granted full access to EU's passport-free area, a historic step for the countries.
SNB's Chairman Schlegel: We take into consideration what other central banks are doing, but the focus is on Switzerland.
SNB reduces key rate by 0.50 points.
atNorth appoints Director of People & Culture and Director of Sustainability to support expansion in Reykjavík, Iceland.
news.summary: AtNorth, a prominent Nordic colocation and high-performance computing company, has recently expanded its workforce by hiring a Director of People & Culture and a Director of Sustainability. This move comes as part of the company's ongoing growth strategy. The appointments were made in Reykjavík, Iceland on December 12, 2024. The company aims to further strengthen its operations with these key personnel additions.

news.headline: SNB's Chairman Schlegel: We can tolerate a weakening of inflation below 0-2% target range, as long as it is temporary.
PUMA opens Studio48 in Herzogenaurach, Germany for designers to innovate. The hub spans 500 sqm; aims to elevate the brand.
news.summary: PUMA, the sports company, has launched Studio48, a creative hub situated at its headquarters in Herzogenaurach, Germany. This innovative space is designed for PUMA designers and creatives to collaborate on fresh ideas, develop concepts for new performance and Sportstyle products, and create campaigns. Studio48, spanning over 500 square meters (5,300 square feet), is integral to PUMA's growth strategy focusing on enhancing the brand's reputation. Through this initiative, PUMA aims to foster sustainability and innovation within the company.

news.headline: SNB's Chairman Schlegel: This step is intended to steady inflation between 0 and 2%.
Bitcoin futures basis reaches staggering 15% as price hits record high daily close, poised to surpass all-time peak soon.
news.summary: Investors are steering clear of leveraged Bitcoin bets following multiple failures. Despite this caution, Bitcoin's price is expected to surpass its previous record highs in a matter of days.

news.headline: SNB's Chairman Schlegel: Our main instrument is the policy rate, and with that, we can influence the economy and exchange rate.
Galaxis boosts online community building with dual staking programs: Governance Staking & Engine Superlock for Web3.
news.summary: The latest features introduced by the Web3 SocialFi platform include Governance Staking and the Engine Superlock programs, integrating community voting influence with incentives for users.

news.headline: SNB's Chairman Schlegel: We still have ammunition left on rates.
SNB's Chairman Schlegel: Inflation pressure in the medium term has declined.
SNB's Chairman Schlegel: We already said further rate cuts might be needed.
IEA: Current balances indicate a 950k BPD supply overhang in 2025 if OPEC+ starts unwinding voluntary cuts from the end of March 2025.
SPIC participates in 7th China International Import Expo to deepen international cooperation and promote energy transformation.
news.summary: Enhancing global collaboration and advancing energy transition in Shanghai, China, the 7th China International Import Expo (CIIE) took place in Shanghai from November 5 to 10, 2024. At this event, four subsidiaries of SPIC signed significant deals involving major equipment and materials. This event focused on boosting international cooperation and driving energy transformation.

news.headline: Incoming Macao chief executive Sam Hou Fai vows to uphold 'one country, two systems', ensuring steady implementation in Macao.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in Beijing, it was announced that Sam Hou Fai would be taking on the role of chief executive in Macao. As the incoming chief executive, he will play a crucial role in ensuring the continued and stable implementation of the "one country, two systems" policy in Macao. This policy is vital for maintaining the unique governance structure of Macao. The appointment of Sam Hou Fai highlights the significance of this position and underscores the importance of effective leadership in upholding this policy.
